---
title: "01 Load and clean PRAMS ARF data"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
# Load Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(here)

# Define path to raw data (portable using here())
raw_path <- here("data", "raw-data", "prams_arf.xlsx")

# Confirm the file exists
stopifnot(file.exists(raw_path))

# Load the raw dataset
raw <- read_excel(raw_path)

# Basic cleaning
prams_clean <- raw |>
  janitor::clean_names() |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(.x, "")))

# Create processed-data folder if it doesn't exist
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Save cleaned dataset
saveRDS(prams_clean, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

# Confirm the file saved
file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))
```



## Load Data Chunk
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

raw_path <- here("data", "raw-data", "prams_arf.csv")
file.exists(raw_path)

raw <- readr::read_csv(raw_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
glimpse(raw)

dat <- raw |>
  rename_with(stringr::str_squish) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), stringr::str_squish)) |>
  distinct()

glimpse(dat)
```

## Save Cleaned file
```{r}
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

saveRDS(dat, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

# Confirm key variables exist
c("PP_DEPRESS", "ASK_DPRS", "WTANAL") %in% names(dat)

# Check ID uniqueness
dat |> summarise(n = n(), n_id_unique = n_distinct(ID))
```

```{r}
# Confirm key variables exist
c("PP_DEPRESS", "ASK_DPRS", "WTANAL") %in% names(raw)

# Check ID uniqueness (raw)
raw |> summarise(n = n(), n_id_unique = n_distinct(ID))
```

```{r}
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

saveRDS(dat, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

```

```{r}
dim(raw)
```

## Clean Data
```{r}
dat <- raw |>
  rename_with(stringr::str_squish) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), stringr::str_squish)) |>
  distinct()

dim(dat)

dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
saveRDS(dat, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))

c("PP_DEPRESS", "ASK_DPRS", "WTANAL") %in% names(dat)

dat |> summarise(
  n = n(),
  n_id_unique = n_distinct(ID),
  n_id_missing = sum(is.na(ID))
)
```

```{r}
c("PP_DEPRESS","ASK_DPRS","WTANAL") %in% names(dat)

```
